working_title: Comparing manual and agent-assisted WordPress drafting
user_question: Should a content team use manual or agent-assisted WordPress drafting?
direct_answer: Choose based on evidence requirements, permission controls, review capacity, and workflow volume.
unique_value: A criterion-matched comparison grounded in the same publishing workflow.
ai_disclosure: AI assisted with evidence collection; a human editor reviews the comparison.
update_trigger: Pricing, permissions, or workflow capabilities materially change.
